name: alembic-codex
description: Use Alembic project memory, Recipes, Guard checks, and bootstrap workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Project memory, Recipes, and Guard checks for Codex
interface.longDescription: Alembic distills source code into local project knowledge, exposes it through MCP, and helps Codex write code that follows the project's real conventions. The Codex plugin uses a lightweight MCP shim that checks local status without starting services and wakes the Alembic daemon only when project knowledge, Guard, Dashboard, or long-running workflows are requested.
defaultPrompt: Run Alembic Codex diagnostics for this project
Check Alembic Codex status for this project
Start an Alembic Codex bootstrap job for this project
Prime Codex with this project's Alembic Recipes
Check my current changes with Alembic Guard
